_description: Master schema for Mythological Character Description Database. Each character file follows this structure.
_usage: AI video/audio generation — visual prompts, voice casting, avatar creation

CHARACTER_KEY._note: Uppercase snake_case key, e.g. SRI_RAMA, ARJUNA

metadata.character_id: string — Unique ID: RAM_001 (Ramayana) or MAH_001 (Mahabharata)
metadata.name: string — Primary display name
metadata.divine_origin: string | null — Divine parentage or avatar status
tags: array — Searchable category tags: warrior, sage, demon, animal, divine, queen, etc.

timelines.context_description: string — What is happening in this timeline

physical_appearance.skin_tone: string — Include Sanskrit/Hindi term + English description

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: string — Detailed outfit description with colors and materials
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: string — Crown, armlets, necklaces with material details
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: string — Specific weapons with names if divine

audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: string — How they speak, cadence, vocabulary

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: string — Ready-to-use prompt for image/video AI models (Flux, DALL-E, Midjourney). Include: style, age, skin, clothing, weapons, setting, quality tags.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: string — Ready-to-use prompt for TTS/voice AI models. Include: gender, age, tone, pitch, emotion, speaking style.
